[PDF_PAGE 128 | score=1] CASTLES &FORTRESSES (Optional) Most wilderness castles and fortresses will already have been placed before play begins. Sometimes, most often when the party is mapping new territory, a prwiously unknown castle may be discovered. In this case, there is a base 1-in-20 chance that any wilderness encounter will be with an unknown stronghold.
